theorem: Lattice code closure: 5-term lattice [1,3,7,21,137], CRT residue 119 mod 153, binding digit realizes closure for all digit combinations
adjudicated_divergence: global mutable sequence counter removed; sequence is an explicit parameter (Event Law determinism)
check digit shown to be constant 2 for all valid codes — the product counted it as a third independent check; it is not
QR codec rewritten: source assumed 3-digit fields while d5 is unbounded, corrupting round-trips for 4+ digit d5
open_obligations: Forgery-cost claims are NOT bound: lattice closure is public math; unforgeability rests on the HMAC layer alone.
Slot lineage decoding (digital-root slot labels) needs its own receipt before claim binding.
